name: Prevue Pet Products Tinkle Turf System for Dogs
description: Prevue Pet Products Tinkle Turf System for Dogs provides a convenient option for your pup to relieve themselves when getting outdoors isn’t an easy option. The synthetic grass square tray will help protect your floors and furniture, plus it’s also an ideal training tool for young pups that can be easily transported when traveling with your pet. The lead-free tray is also protected with microbial odor control.  It’s a soft and realistic turf that’s easy to clean with warm water and dish soap then rinse and let air dry.  It works well with small and larger dogs, too.
